case_title: WINTERS, PHILLIS vs. BELLI, MELVIN DBA LAW OFFICES OF MELVIN BELLI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINTERS, PHILLIS AS TO DEFENDANT BELLI, MELVIN DBA LAW OFFICES OF MELVIN BELLI
